title: Alumni
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Alumni
The NYU Global Network boasts of more than 700,000 alumni worldwide. In NYU Shanghai, we have approximately 3,500 alumni. Stay in touch with this vast global community, read about the latest alumni news and events, and learn more about exclusive alumni benefits available to our alumni community. To receive invitations to upcoming networking and professional events in your area, please update your contact information online.
Hear our alumni talk about their experiences in NYU Shanghai and beyond.
Submit a Class Note
Whether you've changed a job, hit a world record, moved across the world, made new friends, reconnected with old ones, published a book, or married your Violet sweetheart, keep us updated on your news by sharing with us a [class] note.
Alumni Access to the Alumni Lounge
The Alumni Lounge, located on the central quad at the heart of campus, is a welcoming space for NYU Shanghai alumni and graduates from all NYU schools to connect and engage with the wider university community. For access to our Alumni Lounge, check out the access policy.
Alumni Access to Library
All NYU Alumni are welcome to use the NYU Shanghai Library. Check out the access policy.
NYU Executive Mentor Program
The NYU Executive Mentor Program celebrated its 10th anniversary. Hear our mentors and mentees share how the mentor-mentee relationship has helped them find their passion in life.
Alumni Newsletter
View and subscribe to our alumni newsletter for news and information on upcoming events.
Event Photos
Check out photos from recent alumni activities.
Alumni Resource
Video Resources for Alumni to stay up to date within the NYU Shanghai community.
Support Us
Ensure a new generation of students enjoys the same opportunities by giving to the NYU Shanghai Education Development Foundation.
Are You Hiring?
If you’re looking to hire an NYU Shanghai student, post your job listings at Handshake or contact the Career Development Office at shanghai.careerdevelopment@nyu.edu.
Engage with Our Students
Explore programs to help you support the university community, mentorstudents, and share your experiences.
Dinner with Six
Alumni Speaker Series
NYU Executive Mentor Program
Contact Info for Alumni Chapters
Shanghai:shanghai.alumni-shanghai@nyu.edu
Beijing:shanghai.alumni-beijing@nyu.edu
New York:shanghai.alumni-newyork@nyu.edu
